_doc: INFRA-1899 — known-transient CI failure classes. Each entry has a 'class' label and a 'pattern' regex matched against the failing check's name + conclusion + logs (joined newline-separated). See scripts/coord/transient-retrigger.sh.

classes.description: Audit job conclusion=cancelled (defensive after INFRA-1852 root-cause fix).

classes.pattern: could not read Username for 'https://github.com'|fatal: could not read Username
classes.description: actions/checkout auth blip — transient GH token mint race.
cargo-test flake rerunner gave up; a fresh CI run usually clears it.

classes.pattern: SIGPIPE|broken pipe|Temporary failure in name resolution|Could not resolve host|connection reset by peer|TLS handshake timeout|i/o timeout
classes.description: Generic network/runner-side blip during CI step.
